title: Rust SCHC ACK parser zero-fills truncated bitmap instead of rejecting (Python/C reject)
description: rust/lichen-schc/src/fragment.rs:230-232 zero-fills a truncated ACK bitmap body; Python fragment.py:131-134 and C subsys/schc/schc.c:470-471 reject truncated bitmaps. A short ACK that Python/C would drop is accepted-with-zeros by Rust - zeros mean 'all tiles missing' in 1=received polarity, causing spurious retransmission in mixed networks (once fragmentation interop is fixed per mmgu.5). Fix: return an error on truncated bitmap.
